name: Goldcana Resources Inc.
description: Goldcana Resources Inc. is an early-stage junior gold explorer focused on its flagship Triple F Gold Project, comprising eight mineral claims covering approximately 851 acres in the Nicola and Vernon Mining Divisions of south-central British Columbia, roughly 28 km northwest of Kelowna. Historic work has identified gold-bearing quartz veinlets hosted in volcanic agglomerate within a well-defined 300 x 250 m mineralized zone. The company completed a Phase I geological mapping and geochemical survey program and is advancing toward drill-ready status with no NI 43-101 resource estimate yet defined.
